CONTENT.Professional career: Miceli is a product of the S.S. Lazio Youth Sector, and played in several different positions at youth level, from attacking midfielder to centre-back. 10 years after first joining their academy, Miceli made his professional debut for Lazio in a 2017–18 UEFA Europa League group stage 1–1 tie with SBV Vitesse on 23 November 2017.On 2 September 2019, he joined Olbia on loan with an option to purchase.On 3 September 2020 he signed with Piacenza.On 9 July 2021, he moved to Dutch club Dordrecht. He made his debut for the club on 6 August in a 1–1 draw in the Eerste Divisie against Jong PSV.

SUMMARY: Alessio Miceli (born 30 August 1999) is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Spanish Primera Federación club SD Logroñés.
